title: Unified UI Laravel Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the @work-rjkashyap/unified-ui Laravel package (unified-ui.json).

$schema.description: URL to the JSON Schema for editor validation and autocompletion.

aliases.description: Path aliases that control where component files, Alpine.js scripts, CSS, and JS assets are installed. All paths are relative to the Laravel project root.

components.description: Directory where Blade component stubs are installed.

alpine.description: Directory where Alpine.js plugin/script files are installed.

css.description: Directory where CSS files (e.g. design tokens) are installed.

js.description: Directory where general JavaScript files are installed.

alpine.description: Whether Alpine.js is used for interactive components. When true, the init command will ensure Alpine.js is installed.

registry.description: URL of the remote component registry (registry.json). The CLI fetches component definitions, file listings, and dependency metadata from this endpoint.
